name: Asus Prime H610M-K D5 Motherboard
highlights: Intel ® LGA 1700 Socket: Ready for 13 th and 12 th Gen Intel ® processors
Ultrafast Connectivity: PCIe 4.0, 32Gbps M.2 slot, Realtek 1 Gb Ethernet and USB 3.2 Gen 1
Comprehensive Cooling: PCH heatsink and Fan Xpert 2+
Aura Sync RGB Lighting: Onboard Addressable Gen 2 headers for RGB LED strips, easily synced with Aura Sync-capable hardware
Two-Way AI Noise Cancelation: Reduces background noise from the microphone and audio output for crystal-clear communication in games or video conferences
description: Asus Prime H610M-K D5 Intel® H610 (LGA 1700) micro-ATX motherboard, DDR5, PCIe 4.0, M.2 slot, Realtek 1 Gb Ethernet, HDMI™, VGA, USB 3.2 Gen 1, SATA 6 Gbps, Addressable Gen 2 headers, Aura Sync Price in Pakistan Specs CPU Intel Socket LGA1700 for 13th Gen Intel Core & 12th Gen Intel Core, Pentium Gold and Celeron Processors Supports Intel Turbo Boost Technology 2.0 and Intel Turbo Boost Max Technology 3.0 Motherboad Chipset Intel® H610 Chipset Memory 2 x DIMM slots, Max. 96GB, DDR5 5600/5400
